title: Supreme Commander of the Confederation military
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Supreme Commander}}
[[File:TurrPhennir_XWing25.jpg|thumb|right|200px|[[Turr Phennir]], Supreme Commander of the Confederation military during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]]]
{{Quote|General Turr Phennir, Supreme Commander of the Confederation military. At your service.|Turr Phennir|<ref name="Exile">''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]''</ref>}}
'''Supreme Commander of the Confederation military''' was the title accorded to the leader of the [[Confederation Fleet|armed forces]] of the [[Confederation]].

==History==
The post of Supreme Commander was created in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], when the [[Five Worlds]] of the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]] were joined in [[Second Galactic Civil War|their war]] against the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] by other worlds, including [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]] and [[Commenor/Legends|Commenor]]. The member governments of the new union needed to find a relatively neutral military leader to take command of their combined fleets, and new planets were encouraged to join the Confederacy with the suggestion that one of their commanders might be elected as a compromise candidate.<ref name="Exile" />

As the [[Corellian Defense Force/Legends|Corellian Defense Force]] was integrated into the Confederation military, the position of the [[Supreme Commander of the Corellian Defense Force]] was disbanded to be replaced by the new position of Supreme Commander of the Confederation.<ref name="TCSWE">{{CSWECite|I|181|Delpin, Genna}}</ref>

The Confederation led the Alliance to believe that a conference to select the new Supreme Commander was being held at [[Gilatter VIII]]. In fact, [[General/Legends|General]] [[Turr Phennir]] had already been appointed to the position, and the "conference" was a ruse to draw the Alliance into the [[Battle of Gilatter VIII]].<ref name="Exile" />

As Supreme Commander, General Phennir wore a white uniform in a style similar to [[Imperial military uniforms/Legends|those]] worn by officers of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] that he had once served—reminiscent of, if not actually identical to, the uniform of an Imperial [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]].<ref name="Exile" />

At the [[Unification Summit]] in 43 ABY, Phennir appeared with [[Natasi Daala]] and [[Jagged Fel]] as the Confederation's representative indicated that, like the Imperial Remnant, the Supreme Commander acted as a ''de facto'', if not ''de jure'', head of state for the Confederation.<ref name="Outcast">''[[Fate of the Jedi: Outcast]]''</ref>
